title: selaginella cathedrifolia
intro: Selaginella cathedrifolia, also known as spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella cathedrifolia include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exerting antimicrobial and anticancer properties. In herbal preparations, Selaginella cathedrifolia is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional before consumption.
